calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Katheryn Scott (Petitioner in pro per).

Although the Court granted the Petitioner's application for waiver of fess and costs, the Court found a number of deficiencies in the evidence supporting the Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage, denying the same, and advising the Petitioner to seek legal counsel.

Judicial Officer: John Dearman, Judge; Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR# 11722; Bailiff: None; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Court Examiner: Christine Nahnsen.
